Class VaultProperties.Ssl

java.lang.Object
org.springframework.cloud.vault.config.VaultProperties.Ssl
Enclosing class:
VaultProperties
public static class VaultProperties.Ssl extends Object

Author:
Spencer Gibb, Mark Paluch, Kevin Holditch, Michal Budzyn, Grenville Wilson, Mårten Svantesson, Issam El-atif
